creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 4 Feb 2014 23:58:07 +0200 Pavlo Greenberg wrote:
> 2014-02-04 Tijl Coosemans <tijl@freebsd.org>:
> > Can you post the output of "grep -Rl libiconv /usr/local/lib/*"
> 
> Here you are:

Thanks.  Try removing avahi-app first with "pkg del avahi-app" and then
rebuild it.
